message:
Eliminate per-completion heap allocation for foreign wakers in scheduler

Worker.execute() previously allocated a fresh Vec<Waker> on every task
completion to collect foreign-worker wakers. Add scratch_foreign_wakers
field (Cell<Vec<Waker>>) that is reused across polls, matching the
existing scratch_local and scratch_global pattern.

Also add TimerHeap.pop_expired_into() for callers that want to supply
a reusable buffer, avoiding a Vec::with_capacity(4) allocation per tick.

asupersync-umelq.13.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
